title: MetaScenes: Towards Automated Replica Creation for Real-world 3D Scans
title_zh: MetaScenes：面向真实世界3D扫描的自动化副本创建
abstract: Embodied AI (EAI) research requires high-quality, diverse 3D scenes to effectively support skill acquisition, sim-to-real transfer, and generalization. Achieving these quality standards, however, necessitates the precise replication of real-world object diversity. Existing datasets demon strate that this process heavily relies on artist-driven designs, which demand substantial human effort and present significant scalability challenges. To scalably produce realistic and interactive 3D scenes, we first present MetaScenes, a large-scale simulatable 3D scene dataset constructed from real-world scans, which includes 15366 objects spanning 831 fine-grained categories. Then, we introduce SCAN2SIM, a robust multi-modal alignment model, which enables the automated, high-quality replacement of assets, thereby eliminating the reliance on artist-driven designs for scaling 3D scenes. We further propose two benchmarks to evaluate MetaScenes: a detailed scene synthesis task focused on small item layouts for robotic manipulation and a domain transfer task in vision-and-language navigation (VLN) to validate cross-domain transfer. Results confirm MetaScenes ’s potential to enhance EAI by supporting more generalizable agent learning and sim-to-real applications, introducing new possibilities for EAI research.
abstract_zh: 具身人工智能（EAI）研究需要高质量、多样化的3D场景来有效支持技能获取、仿真到现实迁移以及泛化。然而，达到这些质量标准需要精确复制真实世界的物体多样性。现有数据集表明，这一过程严重依赖艺术家驱动的设计，需要大量人力且扩展性差。为了可扩展地生成真实且可交互的3D场景，我们首先提出MetaScenes，一个从真实扫描构建的大规模可仿真3D场景数据集，包含15366个物体，覆盖831个细粒度类别。然后，我们引入SCAN2SIM，一个鲁棒的多模态对齐模型，能够自动高质量地替换资产，从而消除对艺术家驱动设计的依赖。我们进一步提出两个基准来评估MetaScenes：一个聚焦于机器人操作中小物体布局的详细场景合成任务，以及一个视觉语言导航（VLN）中的域迁移任务，以验证跨域迁移。结果证实了MetaScenes在增强EAI方面的潜力，支持更泛化的智能体学习和仿真到现实应用，为EAI研究带来新可能。
tldr_zh: 提出MetaScenes数据集和SCAN2SIM模型，实现真实3D扫描的自动化高质量副本创建。
cover_zh: 告别手工建模｜这个AI框架让3D场景自动复制真实世界
